home.heroSubtitle: Reliable implementation of your oil and gas strategy
home.locationsSubtitle: Operating across major oil and gas regions
home.locationsDescription: The Company's core business activities are drilling of oil and gas wells and a full range of rig-up services. The Company mainly operates in Yamal-Nenets and Khanty-Mansiysk Autonomous Okrugs, Krasnoyarsk Krai, Tyumen and Tomsk Oblasts.
home.locationsMapCaption: Operating across key oil and gas basins with rig-up, drilling, and service support.
home.locationsProjectTitle: Complex well construction and servicing in northern clusters
home.managementQuoteChairman: GazStart is one of the key drilling contractors in Yamal-Nenets and Khanty-Mansiysk Autonomous Okrugs, Tyumen and Tomsk Oblasts. The Company remains on the path of sustainable growth outlined by our long-term business strategy.
home.managementQuoteCeo: Safety, efficiency, and innovation drive everything we do. Our operations teams work to deliver stable results in difficult formations while maintaining the highest production and industrial standards.

about.title: About the Company
about.description: We are a leading provider of drilling and oilfield services with decades of experience in the industry.
